Name: sapdme_staging_v2
Title: Extended Warehouse Management Staging
ShortText: Perform material staging related activities in Extended Warehouse Management integration.
Description: When supplying materials to production, you can use staging requests to make required materials available. You can stage the full quantity of a material at once or stage partial quantities of the material at intervals over a period of time. This API service allows you to perform activities such as staging materials or retrieving staging requests in integration with Extended Warehouse Management.
